description: Add Google Sign-In/Sign-Up support using Supabase Auth OAuth provider, including backend endpoint, frontend Supabase client, auth callback page, and Google buttons on Login/Register pages.
steps: Add GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID to backend/app/config.py Settings class
Create frontend/src/lib/supabase.ts with Supabase client instance
Add googleAuth backend call to frontend/src/api/auth.ts
Add Google Sign-In button with divider to LoginPage.tsx
Add Google Sign-Up button with divider to RegisterPage.tsx
acceptance_criteria: Backend /api/v1/auth/google endpoint is importable and handles token-based auth
Frontend Supabase client is configured with environment variables
AuthCallbackPage handles OAuth redirect and syncs with backend
Login and Register pages show Google button below form with 'hoac' divider
Frontend builds successfully with all new components
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/PWA-Quan-Ly-Nha-Tro/backend && python -c "from app.routers.auth import router; print('Auth router OK')"
